'''Logru''', also known as '''Loghru''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Honoghr system/Legends|Honoghr system]]. It was covered in [[Magma/Legends|molten lava]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-04-XX -->''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''
